Name: Fog
Description: Controls volumetric and height-based fog rendering, including color, density falloff, and scene blending parameters used in post-processing and atmospheric effects.

Fields.Name: Color
Fields.Description: Base fog color used for atmospheric scattering and distance blending; determines the overall tint of the fog volume.

Fields.Name: Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum fog influence distance; controls how far from the camera fog begins to fully obscure scene geometry.

Fields.Name: Height Fog Standard
Fields.Description: Reference height used as the baseline for height-based fog calculations, typically representing ground or sea level.

Fields.Name: Height Fog Intensity
Fields.Description: Controls the strength of vertical fog density variation; higher values increase fog density changes with altitude.

Fields.Name: Upward Attenuation
Fields.Description: Enables fog density reduction as height increases, simulating thinning atmosphere or reduced ground fog impact upward.

Fields.ID: 高さの計算を先に行う
Fields.Name: Perform Height Calculation First
Fields.Description: Determines whether height-based fog evaluation is computed before other fog blending operations for priority ordering.

Fields.ID: カーブの計算を後に行う
Fields.Name: Perform Curve Calculation After
Fields.Description: Applies curve-based fog shaping after other fog computations, allowing post-adjustment of density falloff.

Fields.Name: Alpha
Fields.Description: Overall fog opacity multiplier controlling transparency and blend strength over the final rendered image.

Fields.Name: [Old] Contrast
Fields.Description: Deprecated contrast control previously used to adjust fog density sharpness and tonal separation; no longer actively used.

Fields.Name: Curve
Fields.Description: Controls nonlinear fog density falloff, shaping how quickly fog transitions from near to far distances.

Fields.Name: Scene: Color
Fields.Description: Scene-specific override for fog color, allowing per-scene atmospheric tint customization independent of global fog settings.

Fields.Name: Scene: Distance
Fields.Description: Scene-specific fog distance override controlling how far fog extends within a particular scene context.

Fields.Name: Scene: Height Fog Standard
Fields.Description: Scene-level override for height fog baseline used for localized atmospheric height reference.

Fields.Name: Scene: Height Fog Intensity
Fields.Description: Scene-specific multiplier for height fog intensity, enabling different vertical fog behavior per scene.

Fields.Name: Scene: Alpha
Fields.Description: Scene-level fog opacity override controlling overall fog blending strength for the current scene.

Fields.Name: Scene: Contrast
Fields.Description: Scene-specific contrast adjustment for fog density shaping, affecting perceived sharpness of fog transitions.

Fields.Name: Texture ID: 1
Fields.Description: Primary fog noise or pattern texture used for adding spatial variation and realism to fog density distribution.

Fields.Name: Texture ID: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary fog texture used for blending additional noise layers or animated fog detail variations.

Fields.Name: Forward Movement Magnification (Back/Forward)
Fields.Description: Scales fog movement response along the forward/backward axis, affecting perceived fog flow during camera motion.

Fields.Name: Forward Movement Magnification (Up/Down)
Fields.Description: Controls vertical parallax scaling of fog during forward motion, influencing depth perception in elevation changes.

Fields.Name: Forward Movement Magnification (Left/Right)
Fields.Description: Adjusts horizontal fog motion response during forward movement to simulate parallax shifts across lateral camera movement.

Fields.Name: Forward Movement Magnification: Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum scaling limit for fog movement magnification to prevent excessive compression or distortion effects.

Fields.Name: Forward Movement Magnification: Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum scaling limit for fog movement magnification to cap extreme parallax or motion exaggeration.

Fields.ID: 前移動倍率(回転による)
Fields.Name: Forward Movement Magnification: Due to Rotation
Fields.Description: Adjusts fog displacement intensity based on camera rotation, enhancing rotational parallax effects in fog layers.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Scroll Magnification
Fields.Description: Controls horizontal scrolling speed of animated fog textures, used for drifting or wind simulation effects.

Fields.Name: Vertical Scroll Magnification
Fields.Description: Controls vertical movement speed of fog texture scrolling, simulating rising or falling atmospheric flow.

Fields.ID: クロスフェードの周期
Fields.Name: Crossfade Period
Fields.Description: Duration of fog texture blending cycles, controlling how frequently fog layers transition between states.

Fields.Name: Wave Length and Width Scaling
Fields.Description: Scales spatial frequency of fog wave distortion in both horizontal and vertical directions for stylized motion.

Fields.Name: Wave Strength
Fields.Description: Controls amplitude of procedural fog wave distortion, affecting turbulence and atmospheric motion intensity.

Fields.Name: Wave Period: 1
Fields.Description: Primary frequency controlling fog wave oscillation timing and spatial repetition pattern.

Fields.Name: Wave Period: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary wave frequency used for layered or multi-scale fog motion variation.

Fields.Name: Draw
Fields.Description: Enables or disables fog rendering; when disabled, fog effects are not applied in the final render.

Fields.Name: Contrast
Fields.Description: Adjusts fog density contrast, controlling the sharpness between dense and thin fog regions in the final image.
